---
title: "Evaluation"
description: "Evaluate predicted results and inspect scoring metadata"
author: "Karel Dieussaert"
date: "2026-01-07"
categories: [Evaluation]
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
---
# Evaluation
This example demonstrates `aligner.evaluate(...)`, used to classify predicted alignments with evaluation metadata.

## What you learn

1. How to run evaluation on a set of `relevant_distances`.
2. How to retrieve `EVALUATED_PREDICTIONS` as GeoJSON.
3. How to interpret key output fields such as:
   - evaluation status
   - prediction score
   - selected relevant distance

## Why evaluation is useful

Evaluation helps when you need automated quality interpretation for batch processing, reporting, or downstream decision logic.

## Notes

- The example uses `FullReferenceStrategy.PREFER_FULL_REFERENCE`.
- GRB data is loaded at runtime, so network access is required.

```{python}
#| label: fig-plots
#| fig-cap:
#|   - "Graphic"
#|   - "Visual predictions"
{{< include ../../examples/example_evaluate.py >}}
```
